shared_properties: Project core palette keeps primary #3BBEAC, background #1E1E2E, and accent #FFD700.
Canvas target stays 1920x1080px with pixel-perfect nearest-neighbor presentation at 60 FPS.
Rendering stays 2D pixel art with flat shading and a 1px dark moss outline.
Hazard bubbles keep a transparent cutout and bright interior highlight.
differences: The bomb bubble uses eight frames of flickering fuse light and a red body.
A cream core and gold spark ring separate the explosive unit from route-only hazards.
Frame eight peaks in brightness and compresses the body slightly.

context.usage: Explosive enemy bubble used for warning moments and board-space denial pressure.

specs.texture: Red bubble body with a fuse spark, bright core, and warning pulse ring.
specs.shading: Flat fill with a high-contrast fuse flare.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet size is exactly 256x32px with 8 columns and 1 row.
The warning pulse reaches its brightest state on the final frame without changing the footprint.
Fuse details remain readable at native scale.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_gameplay_balance
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the 9x7 board, balance axis, route overlay, and HUD placement.

reference_images.label: bubble_farm_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the pastel mud farm palette and warm pixel-art tone.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle with a pulse timer and a gameplay fuse countdown component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacles_bomb_bubble_warning_8f_10fps.png during the Loading state and register it with the hazard atlas resource.
runtime_notes: Keep fuse countdown in gameplay data.
Use color modulation for extra pulse intensity rather than duplicate frames.
Reserve a transparent gutter for explosion VFX.
